---
title: "markcaop"
output: html_document
---

````{r}
library(tidyverse)
data <- read_csv("https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1A_Nkqsxh4ymFIJDj7Fbo1SOCoVujhbjb")
data<- data|>na.omit()
nrow(data)
sum(is.na(data))/nrow(data)
reg=lm(`Life expectancy` ‾ Schooling + Status,data)
plot(lm(`Life expectancy` ‾ Schooling + Status,data)$residuals)
reg2=lm(`Life expectancy` ‾ Schooling + Status+`Adult Mortality`+`Hepatitis B`+`Income composition of resources`,data)
plot(reg2$residuals)
data %>%
  filter(Status == "Developing") %>%
  group_by(Country = as.factor(Country)) %>%
  summarize(mean_life_exp = mean(`Life expectancy`, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(mean_life_exp)
data %>%
  filter(Status == "Developed") %>%
  group_by(Country = as.factor(Country)) %>%
  summarize(mean_life_exp = mean(`Life expectancy`, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(mean_life_exp)
boxplot(`Life expectancy`‾Status, data)
data|>select(Country=="Canada")
````
